problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
